system.description: By spending one Quality Assurance from Dynamism or Initiative, these sticky toe shoes can re-orient you to treat the nearest flat and stable surface as “down” and firmly plant you there. This can allow you to walk confidently on the side of buildings, ceilings, or atop moving vehicles. Can be worn under other shoes when not in use. Also available as tire treads for wheelchairs or attachments for other personal mobility devices.
